gallery.title: Gallery

folders.noFoldersHint: Create a folder to organize your generations

folders.addToFolderDescription: Select a folder or create a new one.

gallery.audioPickerBlocked: Audio files can't be selected here — pick an image or video.

prompts.loginDescription: Log in to your account to browse and use the available prompts.

delete.title: Delete prompt

addModal.validationError: Please fill in the title and the prompt

trendingProducts.title: TikTok Shop Ranking

tabs.salesSubtitle: TOP 10 best selling products on TikTok BR
tabs.recommendedSubtitle: TOP 10 most popular products on TikTok BR
tabs.newSubtitle: TOP 10 trending launches on TikTok BR

trendingProducts.loadErrorHint: Check your connection and try again
trendingProducts.paywallDescription: Subscribe to the Starter plan or higher to see trending products on TikTok Shop.

tutorial.title: Tutorials
tutorial.subtitle: Learn how to use every feature

maintenance.title: Section under maintenance
maintenance.description: We're preparing new tutorial videos with the updated step-by-step. Check back soon.

image.title: Generate your first image
image.description: Learn to use the image generation panel to create stunning AI artwork in just a few clicks.
steps: Describe the image you want to create in the prompt field.
Pick the style and settings you want.
Click "Generate" and wait for the result.

video.title: Generate a video
video.description: Turn images or prompts into high-quality animated videos using cutting-edge AI models.
steps: Pick a base image or write a video prompt.
Adjust the duration and style of the video.
Click "Generate Video" and wait for processing.

influencer.title: Create your AI Influencer
influencer.description: Build a complete digital influencer with a visual identity, personality, and consistent looks across generations.
steps: Set the personality and visual style of your influencer.
Generate the base model of your influencer with AI.
Use the influencer you created to generate consistent images and videos.

virtualTryOn.title: Use the Virtual Try-On
virtualTryOn.description: Dress your AI influencer in any outfit in seconds and generate content ready for ads and reviews.
steps: Upload the image of the person or influencer who will wear the outfit.
Upload the photo of the clothing you want to apply.
Click "Generate" and use the result to create posts and ad creatives.

imageToPrompt.title: PROMPT CLONE
imageToPrompt.description: Upload an image and get a structured prompt ready to use in Flux, Nano Banana, SDXL or Veo.
imageToPrompt.toastInvalidFormat: Invalid format. Use JPEG, PNG or WebP.

voices.title: Voices
voices.emptyMyVoices: You haven't saved any voices yet. Clone a voice in the audio panel and save it to reuse here.
voices.deleteError: Couldn't delete the voice. Please try again.
voices.noVoicesForCountry: No voices available for this country.

planBanner.title: Avatar cloning isn't available on your current plan.
planBanner.description: Upgrade to a paid plan to unlock this feature.

createCard.label: Create your clone
createCard.emptyDescription: A single photo is enough. In just a few minutes your digital clone will be ready to speak, gesture and record videos for you.

card.trainingSubtitle: This may take a few minutes

form.headerHint: Reopen this panel by clicking Generate video on the avatar card in "My Avatars".
form.scriptPlaceholder: e.g. Hey everyone, today I'm going to talk about...
form.estimateHint: Charged based on the real video length
form.waitGenerating: Wait for the generation to finish
form.audioRequired: Add an audio file before generating.
form.audioInvalidFormat: Format not supported. Use MP3, WAV, M4A or WEBM.
form.audioMicAccess: Couldn't access the microphone. Allow access in your browser.

create.title: Create new avatar
create.dropPhotoIdle: Drag the photo or click here
create.dropVideoIdle: Drag the video or click here
create.dropPhotoHint: PNG, JPG or WEBP · up to 10 MB
create.dropVideoHint: MP4, MOV or WEBM · 20s to 5 min · up to 500 MB
create.toastSuccessPhoto: Avatar created! It'll be ready in a few seconds.
create.tipPhoto: Photo: from a single front-facing, well-lit photo we build your avatar in about 1 minute. Faster and simpler.
create.tipVideo: Digital Twin: from a short video of your face (20s to 5 min) we create a more realistic clone with natural motion. Takes ~5 min.
create.errorImageType: Use a PNG, JPG or WEBP image.
create.errorVideoType: Use an MP4, MOV or WEBM video.
create.webcamErrorDenied: Permission denied. Allow camera access in your browser.
create.webcamErrorNotFound: No camera found on this device.
create.webcamErrorNotSupported: Your browser doesn't support webcam capture.
create.webcamErrorNoRecording: Your browser doesn't support video recording.
create.consentLabel: I confirm I have authorization to clone this person
create.consentDetails: By checking this you confirm you have legal consent or authorization to clone this image/video. Cloning someone else's likeness without authorization violates our terms of service and may have legal consequences.
